name: evrim-game-mobile-webview
description: Evrim Game React/Vite mobile WebView and Capacitor APK preparation package.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:debug-apk:mac-linux: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:debug-apk:windows: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
